query: SELECT COUNT(*) as totale, section FROM news_items WHERE (title REGEXP '\\b(the|and|for|with|how|why|what|when|will|has|have|are|was|were|been|from|that|this|into|about|after|before|could|would|should|raises|secures|launches|announces|unveils|backs|joins|hits|cuts|drops|wins|loses|says|shows|gets|makes|takes|gives|puts|sets|lets|comes|goes|looks|seems|becomes|remains|keeps|starts|ends|helps|needs|wants|tries|uses|finds|knows|thinks|believes|expects|plans|aims|seeks|offers|provides|supports|includes|requires|allows|enables|leads|follows|creates|builds|develops|grows|expands|improves|increases|reduces|changes|moves|turns|works|plays|runs|stands|holds|brings|sends|calls|asks|tells|means|shows|feels|sees|hears|meets|leaves|lives|dies|falls|rises|opens|closes|breaks|fixes|stops|continues|returns|appears|happens|exists|depends|refers|relates|applies|affects|involves|contains|represents|describes|explains|indicates|suggests|demonstrates|confirms|reveals|reports|claims|argues|notes|states|adds|says|according|based|due|such|both|each|every|other|more|most|less|least|much|many|few|some|any|all|no|not|only|also|even|just|still|already|yet|again|then|now|here|there|where|when|how|why|who|which|what|whose|whom)\\b') = 1 AND language = 'en' GROUP BY section ORDER BY totale DESC LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as totale, section FROM news_items WHERE (title REGEXP '\\b(the|and|for|with|how|why|what|when|will|has|have|are|was|were|been|from|that|this|into|about|after|before|could|would|should|raises|secures|launches|announces|unveils|backs|joins|hits|cuts|drops|wins|loses|says|shows|gets|makes|takes|gives|puts|sets|lets|comes|goes|looks|seems|becomes|remains|keeps|starts|ends|helps|needs|wants|tries|uses|finds|knows|thinks|believes|expects|plans|aims|seeks|offers|provides|supports|includes|requires|allows|enables|leads|follows|creates|builds|develops|grows|expands|improves|increases|reduces|changes|moves|turns|works|plays|runs|stands|holds|brings|sends|calls|asks|tells|means|shows|feels|sees|hears|meets|leaves|lives|dies|falls|rises|opens|closes|breaks|fixes|stops|continues|returns|appears|happens|exists|depends|refers|relates|applies|affects|involves|contains|represents|describes|explains|indicates|suggests|demonstrates|confirms|reveals|reports|claims|argues|notes|states|adds|says|according|based|due|such|both|each|every|other|more|most|less|least|much|many|few|some|any|all|no|not|only|also|even|just|still|already|yet|again|then|now|here|there|where|when|how|why|who|which|what|whose|whom)\\b') = 1 AND language = 'en' GROUP BY section ORDER BY totale DESC LIMIT 10
